## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I did not add real secrets, tokens, portal IDs, app IDs, private URLs, or customer data.
- [ ] I kept examples mock-first or clearly documented the auth path.
- [ ] I updated `.env.example` if new environment variables are needed.
- [ ] I checked `docs/non-developer-safety-gates.md` and `REAL_TOOL_CHECKLIST.md`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run check:ai`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run smoke:example` if behavior changed.
